title: Blueprint Crafted
description: Pack made to turn the whole Minecraft world into a blueprint.
body: Vanilla Minecraft was missing a certain… chaotic charm, so I made this pack to fix that. Well, sort of. Every texture now looks like it’s straight out of a blueprint, giving the whole game a hilariously technical, slightly cursed vibe. Nothing here is meant for serious building or planning, it’s just pure, silly fun to look at. I even gave the GUI a little facelift so it fits the theme and matches the overall cursedness, making the whole experience feel a bit more alive and ridiculous. It’s the perfect pack for anyone who wants to play Minecraft in a totally unexpected, blueprint inspired way.
